name: Easy Doughnuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the liquids (eggs, milk, vanilla) together in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the dry ingredients (sugar, flour, baking powder, nutmeg).
3. Gradually add the dry mixture to the liquid mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Roll out the dough on a lightly floured surface into thin rounds or shapes.
5. Cut the shaped dough using a round cutter or knife (avoid using holes).
6. Heat oil in a deep pot to at least 375°F (190°C).
7. Gently lower the rolled dough pieces into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes per side.
8. Remove the doughnuts from the oil with tongs or a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
9. Dust the cooked doughnuts generously with white sugar before serving.
(Note: This recipe is for easy homemade doughnuts that can be enjoyed within about 5-8 minutes of frying.)
